drawer.title: Personalization Settings

navbar.title: Navbar Style
navbar.description: Choose how the top navigation is displayed
navbar.normalDesc: Use the current split navigation layout
navbar.radioCenterDesc: Use a centered floating pill navigation layout
navbar.basicHeaderDesc: Use a left-brand header with grouped pill navigation
navbar.settingsLayoutDesc: Keep navigation fixed on the left with content on the right

privacy.title: Privacy Mode
privacy.description: Protect your privacy and data security
privacy.label: Enhanced Privacy Protection
privacy.details: Hide sensitive information, limit data collection, protect user privacy

experimental.title: Experimental Features
experimental.description: Try out new features in testing
experimental.label: Enable Experimental Features
experimental.details: Features may be unstable, use with caution in production

drawer.autoSave: Settings will be automatically saved to local storage

system.title: System Settings
system.description: Customize system appearance and behavior preferences

autoBackup.title: Auto Backup
autoBackup.description: Periodically backup system configuration and data

backupRetention.title: Backup Retention
backupRetention.description: Maximum number of backup files to retain

autoSave.title: Auto Save
autoSave.description: Automatically save modified configurations and forms

autoUpdate.title: Auto Update
autoUpdate.description: Automatically check and prompt for updates

telemetry.title: Telemetry Data
telemetry.description: Send usage data to help improve the product

toast.resetSuccessDesc: Settings have been restored to default values

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Manage authentication and OAuth2 authorization configuration

profile.title: Personal Profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information and account settings

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload your avatar image, square images recommended

alerts.title: Alert Settings
alerts.description: Configure system alert thresholds and trigger conditions

cpuUsage.title: CPU Usage Alert
cpuUsage.description: Alert when CPU usage exceeds threshold

memoryUsage.title: Memory Usage Alert
memoryUsage.description: Alert when memory usage exceeds threshold

diskUsage.title: Disk Usage Alert
diskUsage.description: Alert when disk usage exceeds threshold

loginFailure.title: Login Failure Alert
loginFailure.description: Alert when consecutive login failures exceed count

remoteLogin.title: Remote Login Alert
remoteLogin.description: Alert when remote login is detected

sensitiveOps.title: Sensitive Operation Alert
sensitiveOps.description: Alert when sensitive operation is executed

wechat.title: WeChat Work Notification
wechat.description: Send notifications via WeChat Work Bot

groups.title: Notification Groups
groups.description: Manage notification recipient groups and members

rules.title: Notification Rules
rules.description: Configure notification trigger rules and sending policies

systemAlerts.title: System Resource Alert Rule
systemAlerts.description: Notify operations team when system resources exceed threshold

securityAlerts.title: Security Event Alert Rule
securityAlerts.description: Immediately notify security team when security event is detected

exampleConditions.securityEvents: Detected abnormal login or sensitive operation

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Regularly update password to improve account security

requirements.minLength: • Password must be at least 6 characters long
requirements.recommended: • Recommended to include letters, numbers, and special characters

oauth2.title: OAuth2 Authentication
oauth2.description: Only one third-party login method can be bound
oauth2.notBound: No OAuth2 login method bound yet

toast.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields
toast.passwordMismatchDesc: New password and confirmation password do not match
toast.passwordTooShortDesc: New password must be at least 6 characters long
toast.passwordChangeSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully updated
toast.checkCurrentPassword: Please check if your current password is correct
toast.checkConnection: Please check your network connection and try again
toast.usernameChangeSuccessDesc: Your username has been successfully updated
toast.usernameChangeError: An error occurred while changing username
toast.githubConfigSaved: GitHub OAuth2 configuration has been successfully saved
toast.cloudflareConfigSaved: Cloudflare OAuth2 configuration has been successfully saved
toast.githubConfigError: An error occurred while saving GitHub OAuth2 configuration
toast.cloudflareConfigError: An error occurred while saving Cloudflare OAuth2 configuration
toast.unbindSuccessDesc: OAuth2 login method has been successfully unbound

config.title: File Log Cleanup
config.description: Manage automatic cleanup rules for runtime log files
config.hintDesc: The system periodically removes runtime log files older than the retention period to control disk usage. Cleanup tasks run automatically in the background, or can be triggered manually.

modal.title: Configure Log Cleanup Rules
modal.enableAutoCleanupDesc: When enabled, expired logs will be cleaned up periodically according to the configured rules
modal.retentionDaysDesc: Database events older than this number of days will be deleted
modal.maxRecordsPerDayDesc: Maximum database event records per endpoint per day, 0 for unlimited
modal.warningDesc: Log cleanup will affect system log retention period. Cleaned logs cannot be recovered. Please set retention days according to actual needs.

toast.statsNetworkError: Failed to retrieve log statistics, please check network connection
toast.configNetworkError: Failed to retrieve cleanup configuration, please check network connection
toast.updateSuccessDesc: Log cleanup configuration has been saved
toast.updateNetworkError: Configuration update failed, please check network connection
toast.cleanupStartedDesc: Log cleanup will run in the background, please check statistics later
toast.cleanupNetworkError: Failed to start cleanup task, please check network connection

historyCleanup.title: Database History Cleanup
historyCleanup.description: Manage retention for traffic details, summaries, and operation records

compaction.title: Offline SQLite compaction recommended
compaction.description: Reusable space is {{size}}, above the 256 MB notification threshold. Stop NodePassDash and back up the database before following the maintenance guide.

config.title: Retention Policy
config.description: Historical data is removed in batches to limit database write contention.
config.executionPlan: Runs daily at {{time}}, up to {{count}} rows per batch

stats.title: Historical Data Overview
stats.description: Expired counts use the currently saved retention policy
stats.noData: No historical data statistics are available

preview.title: Confirm Cleanup Scope
preview.total: Approximately {{count}} expired rows will be deleted
preview.warning: Deleted data cannot be recovered. The final count may vary slightly as new data is written.
preview.noExpired: There are no expired records to clean up

errors.title: Database Cleanup Error
errors.load: Unable to load database cleanup settings
errors.refresh: Unable to refresh database cleanup status
errors.save: Unable to save the database cleanup policy
errors.preview: Unable to generate a cleanup preview
errors.busy: A database cleanup task is already running

toast.refreshedDesc: Database status and retention policy are up to date
toast.savedDesc: The new rules will apply to the next cleanup task
toast.cleanupStartedDesc: Expired records are being processed in batches
toast.cleanupCompletedDesc: Historical data statistics have been updated

deployment.title: Deployment Environment
deployment.dockerDetails: Docker supports auto-update: downloads the new binary, replaces it, then exits — the container is restarted automatically by Docker's restart policy
deployment.dockerManualDetails: Docker environment recommended to update via host commands for stable and reliable updates
deployment.dockerRestartHint: Container must be configured with restart: unless-stopped/always, or run under systemd / supervisor — otherwise the process will not restart after exit
deployment.binaryDetails: Downloads the latest binary and replaces it; relies on a system supervisor (systemd Restart=always / supervisor) to restart the process after exit
deployment.binaryRestartHint: Without a process supervisor (systemd / supervisor), the process must be started manually after exit
deployment.unknownDetails: Please check the update instructions for manual update

docker.desc: Execute the following commands on Docker host:

binary.auto: Click the button above to automatically update
binary.autoDesc: The program will automatically download, stop, replace, and restart
binary.manual: Or manually update: Download from GitHub → Stop program → Replace files → Restart

alert.updateStarted:
Update started: {{message}}

The program will automatically restart in a few seconds, please wait...

db.title: Database Info
db.description: Runtime status and basic information of the current database

update.chipTooltipHasUpdate: New version {{version}} available — click to view
update.timeout: Update timed out, check server logs

popover.restartHint: Restart the service to apply the update
